title: hymenophyllum cruentum
intro: Hymenophyllum cruentum, also known as the Red-stemmed filmy fern, is a species of small fern native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum cruentum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and eczema. Hymenophyllum cruentum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
